name: Standalone Tag Editor
notes: Standalone React functional component; not mounted in App.jsx — exists as an alternative to DocumentGrid's built-in inline tag editor modal (DocumentGrid.jsx:812-860).
Accepts three props: documentId (string), initialTags (string[]), onTagsUpdated (callback fired with the saved tag array after a successful PUT).
Maximum 10 tags enforced client-side (tags.length < 10); the same limit is re-enforced server-side in PUT /api/documents/:id/tags before the SQL UPDATE.
Save button is disabled and shows 'Saving…' while the PUT request is in-flight; errors are logged to console only — no user-visible error state is rendered.
